import '../base/currencies_base.dart';
import '../mixins/currencies_mixin.dart';

class Currency extends CurrencyBase with CurrencyMixin<Currency> {
  static const ENTITY_NAME = 'Currency';
  static const PREFIX = 'ccy';
  static const COLUMNS = [
   'ccy_code',
   'ccy_name',
   'ccy_symbol',
   'ccy_data',
   'ccy_created_at',
   'ccy_updated_at',
   'ccy_valid',
  
  ];
  static const COL_CODE = 'ccy_code';
  static const COL_NAME = 'ccy_name';
  static const COL_SYMBOL = 'ccy_symbol';
  static const COL_DATA = 'ccy_data';
  static const COL_CREATED_AT = 'ccy_created_at';
  static const COL_UPDATED_AT = 'ccy_updated_at';
  static const COL_VALID = 'ccy_valid';
  

  Currency([Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {}])
      : super(
      initialData: initialData,
      name: ENTITY_NAME,
      prefix: PREFIX,
      columns: COLUMNS);

  @override
  Currency get self {
    return this;
  }

  @override
  String singlePKValue() {
    return 'code';
  }


  @override
  List<String> identifierColumns() {
    return [

      COL_CODE,
    ];
  }
  @override
  Currency fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
    return Currency(json);
  }


  String get code { return doGet(COL_CODE, String); }
  set code(String v) { doSet(COL_CODE, v, String); }
  String getCode() { return code; }
  Currency setCode(String v) { code = v; return this; }

  String get name { return doGet(COL_NAME, String); }
  set name(String v) { doSet(COL_NAME, v, String); }
  String getName() { return name; }
  Currency setName(String v) { name = v; return this; }

  String get symbol { return doGet(COL_SYMBOL, String); }
  set symbol(String v) { doSet(COL_SYMBOL, v, String); }
  String getSymbol() { return symbol; }
  Currency setSymbol(String v) { symbol = v; return this; }

  Map get data { return doGet(COL_DATA, Map); }
  set data(Map v) { doSet(COL_DATA, v, Map); }
  Map getData() { return data; }
  Currency setData(Map v) { data = v; return this; }

  String get created_at { return doGet(COL_CREATED_AT, String); }
  set created_at(String|num v) { doSet(COL_CREATED_AT, v, String); }
  String getCreatedAT() { return created_at; }
  Currency setCreatedAT(String|num v) { created_at = v; return this; }

  String get updated_at { return doGet(COL_UPDATED_AT, String); }
  set updated_at(String|num v) { doSet(COL_UPDATED_AT, v, String); }
  String getUpdatedAT() { return updated_at; }
  Currency setUpdatedAT(String|num v) { updated_at = v; return this; }

  bool get valid { return doGet(COL_VALID, bool); }
  set valid(bool v) { doSet(COL_VALID, v, bool); }
  bool getValid() { return valid; }
  Currency setValid(bool v) { valid = v; return this; }

}
